name: Thousand Oaks Wood Scalloped End Table with Drawers Natural Wood - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Keep this Thousand Oaks Wood Scalloped End Table with Drawers from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee beside your sofa or couch for the perfect blend of style and function. This light brown table is designed in a simple square shape. It features smooth tabletop and two drawers underneath with scalloped fronts and sleek metal pulls, providing plenty of room for storage and display. Standing at a height of 24.25 inches, it features four short, splayed legs supporting the artisanal scalloped table for an elegant look.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
